transactions.desc: The Royals recalled Cerantola from Triple-A Omaha on Friday.
The White Sox recalled Gilbert from Triple-A Charlotte on Friday.
The Guardians selected Fairchild's contract from Triple-A Columbus on Friday, Tim Stebbins of MLB.com reports.
The Cardinals selected Velazquez's contract from Triple-A Memphis on Friday.
The Cardinals optioned Prieto to Triple-A Memphis on Friday.
The Cardinals recalled Crooks from Triple-A Memphis on Friday.
The Cardinals optioned Pozo to Triple-A Memphis on Friday.
The Pirates activated Jones (elbow) from the 60-day injured list Friday.
Pittsburgh designated Lawrence for assignment Friday.
The Rays designated Heasley for assignment Friday, Marc Topkin of the Tampa Bay Times reports.
The Rays selected Wantz's contract from Triple-A Durham on Friday.
The Rays optioned Williams to Triple-A Durham on Friday, Marc Topkin of the Tampa Bay Times reports.
The Rays activated Williamson (back) from the 10-day injured list Friday, Marc Topkin of the Tampa Bay Times reports.
The Reds selected Marte's contract from Triple-A Louisville on Friday.
Atlanta recalled Molina from Triple-A Gwinnett on Friday.
Atlanta designated Carrasco for assignment Friday.
The Twins activated Laweryson (forearm) from the 15-day injured list Friday.
The Twins recalled Funderburk from Triple-A St. Paul on Friday.
The Giants optioned Brennan to Triple-A Sacramento on Friday.
The Rangers released McCutchen on Thursday.
Espinal was outrighted to Triple-A Oklahoma City on Thursday, Noah Camras of SI.com reports.
Adams was optioned to Triple-A St. Paul following Thursday's 6-2 loss to the White Sox, Dan Hayes of The Athletic reports.
The Rockies reinstated Criswell (elbow) from the 60-day injured list Thursday and optioned him to Triple-A Albuquerque, Thomas Harding of MLB.com reports.
The Pirates optioned Valdez to Triple-A Indianapolis on Thursday.
The Pirates recalled Callihan from Triple-A Indianapolis on Thursday.
The Rangers reinstated Freeman (back) from the injured list Thursday and optioned him to Triple-A Round Rock.
The Orioles reinstated Kjerstad (hamstring) from the 60-day injured list and optioned him to Triple-A Norfolk on Thursday, Cordell Woodland of 105.7 The Fan Baltimore reports.
The Orioles selected Weston's contract from Triple-A Norfolk on Thursday, Andy Kostka of TheBanner.com reports.
The Orioles optioned Gibson to Triple-A Norfolk on Thursday, Andy Kostka of TheBanner.com reports.
The Red Sox recalled Samaniego from Triple-A Worcester on Thursday, Gabrielle Starr of the Boston Herald reports.
